3064660.name: Gravity Sphere
3064660.description: Gravity Sphere is a 3D puzzle game that challenges you to master the art of gravitational manipulation. Set in a futuristic environment, your goal is to guide a projectile ball through a series of levels, each designed to test your problem-solving skills and strategic thinking. Each level presents unique challenges and requires innovative solutions that will test your intuition of physics.
3064660.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
